new_value: Reviewed last 20 commits (c9f92bd41,88a4f501c,a42b97e6f,4da6d3836,1fbb881b5,10660c792 and merges). Examined diffs to spec/drafts/*.md (schnorr, link, schc-lora,rpl-lora), spec/02a,03,05,11,appendix-*.md. Confirmed adherence to MUST match test/vectors/* exactly, sync_word=0x34 (via public_network flag+LR1110_NETWORK_PUBLIC), SCHNORR48_SIG_LEN=48 (LICHEN_SIG_LEN), LLSec frame format (LENGTH+LLSec+EPO+SEQ+DST+PLD+MIC), IPv6 IID derivation, SCHC rules, CBOR/SenML encoders, CCP pseudocode, unsigned modular arith. Fixes improved compliance; no deviations found. No new [spec-compliance] bugs filed. Epic complete.
